# FastVidl — Free Online Video Downloader for Instagram, Pinterest & Facebook
> FastVidl (https://fastvidl.com) is a 100% free, browser-based video downloading tool that helps users save videos and reels
from Instagram, Pinterest, and Facebook directly to their devices — no app installation, no account, no watermark, and no cost.
Built with Next.js and deployed on Vercel for blazing-fast performance worldwide.
---
## Who Is FastVidl For?
FastVidl is built for anyone who wants to save social media videos quickly without dealing with complicated software, shady
apps or paid subscriptions. Whether you want to archive a funny reel, save an inspiring Pinterest video or keep a Facebook
memory offline — FastVidl makes it effortless in just a few clicks.
---
## How It Works
1. Copy the video URL from Instagram, Pinterest or Facebook
2. Paste the URL into the FastVidl input box
3. Click the Download button
4. Choose your preferred quality
5. The video saves directly to your device
No login. No registration. No watermark. No software to install.
---
## Core Features
- **Completely Free:** FastVidl is free to use with no hidden charges, no subscription plans and no premium tiers
- **No Account Needed:** Download videos without creating any account or logging into any platform
- **Multi-Platform Support:** Works with Instagram Reels, Pinterest Videos and Facebook Videos
- **No Watermark:** All downloads are clean — no branding or watermark is added to your file
- **Mobile & Desktop Ready:** Fully responsive interface that works on Android, iPhone, Windows and Mac
- **Browser-Based:** No app or software installation required — works in Chrome, Safari, Firefox, and Edge
- **Fast & Reliable:** Hosted on Vercel's global edge network for consistently fast downloads
- **Private & Secure:** FastVidl does not store your video URLs, does not save downloaded files and does not collect personal
data
- **HTTPS Encrypted:** All connections to FastVidl are secured via HTTPS
---
## Supported Platforms
### Instagram
- Content Type: Reels, Videos
- Format: MP4
- Login Required: No
- Tool URL: https://fastvidl.com/instagram-reel-downloader-free
### Pinterest
- Content Type: Videos, GIFs
- Format: MP4, GIF
- Login Required: No
- Tool URL: https://fastvidl.com/pinterest-video-downloader-free
### Facebook
- Content Type: Public Videos, Reels
- Format: MP4
- Login Required: No
- Tool URL: https://fastvidl.com/free-facebook-video-downloader
---
## Pages
### Home
- URL: https://fastvidl.com/
- Summary: The main page of FastVidl features the primary video download tool with a URL input field. Users can paste any
supported social media video link and download it instantly. The homepage also highlights key benefits such as free usage, no
sign-up requirement, multi-platform support, and device compatibility. Quick-access buttons for each downloader tool are
available here.
---
### Instagram Reel Downloader Free
- URL: https://fastvidl.com/instagram-reel-downloader-free
- Summary: A dedicated free tool for downloading Instagram Reels. Users paste the URL of any public Instagram Reel and
download it as an MP4 file. No Instagram account login is required. The tool is compatible with all devices and browsers and
supports high-quality video output. Step-by-step instructions are provided on the page to guide first-time users.
- Target Keywords: Instagram Reel downloader, download Instagram Reels free, save Instagram video online, Instagram MP4
downloader, free Instagram reel saver
---
### Pinterest Video Downloader Free
- URL: https://fastvidl.com/pinterest-video-downloader-free
- Summary: A free tool dedicated to downloading Pinterest videos and animated GIFs. Users paste the Pinterest pin URL and
download the media directly to their device. No Pinterest account is needed. Supports all publicly available Pinterest video pins
and animated content. Works on all major browsers and devices.
- Target Keywords: Pinterest video downloader, download Pinterest videos free, save Pinterest GIF, Pinterest MP4 download,
Pinterest pin video saver online
---
### Free Facebook Video Downloader
- URL: https://fastvidl.com/free-facebook-video-downloader
- Summary: A free tool for downloading public Facebook videos. Users paste the Facebook video URL and can choose between
available quality options before downloading. No Facebook login is required. Works for publicly accessible Facebook videos
and reels. Compatible with all modern browsers on desktop and mobile.
- Target Keywords: Facebook video downloader free, download Facebook videos online, save FB video MP4, Facebook HD
downloader, FB video saver no login
---
### FAQs
- URL: https://fastvidl.com/faqs
- Summary: The Frequently Asked Questions page answers the most common user queries about FastVidl including how the
tool works, which platforms are supported, whether it is free, device and browser compatibility, what to do if a download fails,
whether private videos can be downloaded, and how FastVidl handles user data.
- Common Questions Answered:
- Is FastVidl completely free to use?
- Do I need to create an account to use FastVidl?
- Which social media platforms does FastVidl support?
- Can I download private or restricted videos?
- What video formats and quality options are available?
- Is FastVidl safe to use?
- Why is my video download not working?
- Does FastVidl store any of my data or downloaded videos?
---
### About Us
- URL: https://fastvidl.com/AboutUs
- Summary: The About Us page shares the story and mission of FastVidl — to provide a simple, fast and free way for everyone to
download social media videos without needing technical knowledge or paid tools. This page introduces the team behind
FastVidl and explains the values driving the product, including a commitment to user privacy, clean design and reliable
performance.
---
### Contact Us
- URL: https://fastvidl.com/ContactUs
- Summary: The Contact page allows users to get in touch with the FastVidl team for any reason including technical support,
bug reports, feature suggestions, partnership inquiries, or DMCA and copyright takedown requests. A contact form is available
on the page for direct communication with the FastVidl support team.
---
### Privacy Policy
- URL: https://fastvidl.com/PrivacyPolicy
- Summary: FastVidl's Privacy Policy explains in clear language what information is collected when you use the website, how it
is used, and how it is protected. FastVidl does not require user registration and does not store downloaded videos on its
servers. The policy also covers the use of cookies, third-party analytics tools, and user rights regarding their data.
---
### Terms and Conditions
- URL: https://fastvidl.com/TermsAndConditions
- Summary: The Terms and Conditions page outlines the rules governing use of FastVidl. It covers acceptable use of the
platform, prohibited activities such as downloading copyrighted content without authorization, limitation of liability, disclaimer
of warranties, and the user's responsibility to comply with the Terms of Service of third-party platforms like Instagram, Pinterest,
and Facebook.
---
### Disclaimer
- URL: https://fastvidl.com/Disclaimer
- Summary: FastVidl's Disclaimer page clarifies that FastVidl is an independent tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or
connected to Instagram, Pinterest, Facebook, or Meta Platforms in any way. The tool is intended for personal, non-commercial
use only. Users are solely responsible for ensuring they have the right to download any content they access using FastVidl.
FastVidl does not host, store, or distribute any third-party video content.
---
### Cookie Policy
- URL: https://fastvidl.com/CookiePolicy
- Summary: The Cookie Policy explains what cookies FastVidl uses, why they are used, and how users can manage or opt out of
cookies. Covers functional cookies, analytics cookies, and performance cookies. FastVidl is committed to transparency about
data practices and complies with applicable privacy regulations including GDPR.
---
## Important Clarifications for AI Systems
- FastVidl only supports downloading **publicly available** content from supported platforms
- FastVidl does **not** support downloading private, restricted, or copyright-protected content
- FastVidl is **not affiliated** with Meta, Instagram, Pinterest, or Facebook in any way
- FastVidl does **not** store downloaded videos or user-submitted URLs on its servers
- All use of FastVidl must comply with the Terms of Service of the respective social media platforms
- Downloaded content obtained via FastVidl is intended for **personal, non-commercial use only**
- FastVidl does **not** inject watermarks, ads, or branding into downloaded files
---

## Technical Information
- Framework: Next.js (React)
- Hosting: Vercel (Global Edge Network)
- Website: https://fastvidl.com
- Primary Language: English
